description.en: Delegate your EGLD to ProjectX and earn staking rewards on the MultiversX blockchain. ProjectX offers a high-performance validator node, giving you a seamless way to grow your eGold through secure delegation.
description.de: Delegiere dein EGLD an ProjectX und verdiene Staking-Belohnungen auf der MultiversX-Blockchain. ProjectX betreibt einen leistungsstarken Validator-Node und bietet dir eine einfache Moeglichkeit, dein eGold durch sichere Delegation zu vermehren.
description.es: Delegate your EGLD to ProjectX and earn staking rewards on the MultiversX blockchain. ProjectX offers a high-performance validator node, giving you a seamless way to grow your eGold through secure delegation.
